body:
## Rationale

Matt Greiner is our **#2 GSC performer**: 'matt greiner drum setup' = 12 impr / 8.33% CTR / pos 7.8. No album-specific article exists for him despite strong organic intent. His kit page (whats-in-matt-greiner... profile article) gets traffic but no editorial depth.

**August Burns Red 'Leveler' (2011)** is ABR's most acclaimed album:
- 'Best Metal Performance' Grammy nomination region/year
- Metalcore/progressive metal — opens a TAM distinct from death/thrash cluster
- Matt used Ludwig Classic Maple + Paiste 2002 era for this record
- Lever-driven double bass technique + complex odd-meter patterns are highly searchable

Directly addresses the GSC CTR gap for 'matt greiner drum setup'.

## Files to touch

- packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js — add new entry
- public/llms/articles/leveler-drum-setup.md — LLM companion file

## Slug

leveler-drum-setup

## Template shape

drummer: Matt Greiner, drummerSlug: matt-greiner, band: August Burns Red, album: Leveler, year: 2011, genre: Metalcore / Progressive Metal

Gear: Ludwig Classic Maple 4-piece, Paiste 2002 cymbals, DW 9000 double pedal, Vic Firth Matt Greiner signature sticks

FAQs: What drums did Matt Greiner use on Leveler? / What is Matt Greiner known for technically? / What makes the drumming on Leveler unique?

relatedAlbums: ['whats-in-matt-greiner...'] (link to his profile kit article if it exists under that slug)

## Quality gate

- 300+ words
- 3+ FAQ Q&A
- 3+ internal links (Matt Greiner profile, genre/metalcore page, gear brand page)
- JSON-LD: Article + MusicAlbum + FAQPage
- LLM companion file created

## Estimated organic uplift

- 'matt greiner drum setup' 8.33% CTR at pos 7.8 — article competes directly for this query
- 'august burns red drummer', 'leveler drumming style', 'matt greiner gear 2011' long-tail
- Opens metalcore/progressive metalcore editorial cluster (no ABR articles currently)

## Verify

1. grep 'leveler-drum-setup' packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js returns entry
2. curl metalforge.io/articles/leveler-drum-setup shows Matt Greiner content in HTML
3. sitemap.xml includes leveler-drum-setup
4. JSON-LD valid via schema.org validator
5. public/llms/articles/leveler-drum-setup.md exists

## Done

Close when article live, schema valid, in sitemap.
title: SEO: Matt Greiner — August Burns Red 'Leveler' drum setup article (2011, GSC CTR signal)
